note: 60632 Archer Heights is a dense industrial corridor with major metal fabrication; packaging; food manufacturing; and logistics sectors anchored by Bagcraft/Novolex ($279M; 1200 emp); Chicago Metal Fabricators (founded 1908); and Vitner's/Utz snack distribution.

The 45th & Tripp area is the industrial epicenter. Key properties include Vitner's distribution (4202 W 45th); Isola Imports (4525 S Tripp; 52;600 SF); and a large 92;859 SF flex building at 4500 S Tripp. Part of the Crawford Industrial Park with direct I-55 access.

Bagcraft Packaging at 3900 W 43rd St is the largest North American converter of paper-based flexible foodservice packaging. Part of Novolex portfolio. ~1;200 employees; $279M+ revenue. Produces bags; deli paper; coffee sleeves; trays. Runs EcoCraft sustainable line. Founded 1947.

Exceptional rail access: BNSF Corwith Intermodal (1 sq mi; 6 Class I railroads); Belt Railway of Chicago (largest intermediate switching terminal in US; 8;400 cars/day); Chicago Rail Link. 7 intermodal yards within 30 min of 4800 S Kilbourn.

Sterling Bay's $25M; 147;500 SF Class-A spec industrial warehouse at 4510 W Ann Lurie Pl (tax incentive approved 2023). City's 'Moving Archer Forward' initiative (2025-2026) evaluating land use and zoning. Bridge Industrial vying to redevelop Ford City Mall into 913K SF warehouse complex.

Major listing: 4800 S Kilbourn Ave (237;694 SF; 8.58 acres; 4 overhead bridge cranes up to 15 ton; 14-41 ft clear height; 12 interior docks; near 7 intermodal yards). Multiple flex spaces (12K-71K SF) available along Tripp corridor at $8.95-$9.50/SF/YR.

Midway International Airport is a major economic driver for Archer Heights; providing jobs and attracting businesses that rely on proximity to air travel. Stevenson Expressway (I-55) provides easy access to downtown Chicago.

Archer Avenue and Cicero Avenue are the primary commercial/industrial corridors. Cicero Ave hosts a mix of retail; industrial; and service businesses. Archer Ave corridor improvements planned including bike lanes and traffic safety (controversial due to parking concerns).
Angelica Garcilazo Agency Inc. — New business license issued 04/05/2026 at 5030 S Archer Ave Floor 1; Chicago; IL 60632. Insurance agency operating on primary Archer Ave commercial corridor.

Cementmex — Business license issued 04/25/2026 at 5204 S Washtenaw Ave; Chicago; IL 60632. Construction materials/supply in Brighton Park area at southwest edge of 60632. Mexican cement products distribution.

4900 S Archer Ave — Archer Medical Arts Building office/retail listing on LoopNet. 1;950 SF available; up to 5;450 SF. Zoned C2-3. Private parking 30+ vehicles. On Archer Ave (21;700 VPD) & 49th St across from Curie HS; near CTA Pulaski Orange Line.
4239 S Archer Ave #2 — 1;800 SF ground-floor commercial storefront available. Previously a dental office. Adaptable for medical; retail; salon; professional office. $3;500/mo. Listed Apr 2026.
4239 S Archer Ave — Mixed-use investment property. Three ground-floor commercial units totaling ~5;400 SF. Two leased; one vacant. Listed MLS Apr 2; 2026.
Marshalls at 4130 S Pulaski Rd; Archer Heights confirmed remaining open amid Hyde Park closure (Apr 2026). Regional retail anchor on Pulaski Rd.
IBM quantum innovation hub on Chicago South Side announced Apr 29; 2026. 750 new full-time jobs. Proximity positive for Archer Heights workforce pool.
Chicago warehouse vacancy ticked up Q1 2026 per Crain's (Apr 27). Demand below pandemic peak but still strong for well-located properties with multimodal access like 60632.
Brookfield broke ground on Western Works — 4-building; 560K+ SF industrial campus in Back of the Yards (Apr 17). Signals institutional appetite for Chicago industrial near I-55.
